title: Xenial Molten Turkish Plum Tomatoes Kebabs
description: A kid-friendly Turkish dish featuring plum tomatoes and bonito flakes, this recipe is herbal and molten, perfect for a family dinner. It is also shojin-friendly, making it suitable for vegetarians and vegans who consume fish.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, garlic, dried oregano, salt, and black pepper.
Add the halved plum tomatoes to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread a plum tomato half onto each wooden skewer.
Sprinkle bonito flakes over the plum tomatoes.
Place the skewers on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake the skewers in the preheated oven for 20 minutes.
Remove the skewers from the oven and let them cool for a few minutes.
Serve the Xenial Molten Turkish Plum Tomatoes Kebabs hot.
Garnish with fresh parsley or dill, if desired.
